name: Transport to the port of entry
pageTitle: Transport to the port of entry - Import and export applications - GOV.UK
caption: Transport
heading: Transport to the port of entry
legacyNote: IPAFFS legacy source for this page is importer/transportBeforeBIP.html rendered via the CED (CHED-D) branch. The template and its route handler (routes/handlers/importer/transport_before_bip.js) confirm the CED-specific copy: ALTERNATE_TITLES_AND_LABELS[CED] sets primaryTitle 'Transport to the port of entry', bcp label 'Port of entry' / topOption 'Select port of entry', estimatedArrival.date.title 'Estimated arrival at port of entry', meansOfTransport.title 'Means of transport to port of entry' / topOption 'Select means of transport to port of entry' (transport_before_bip.js:105-127) — all matching the confirmed rendered values. For standard CHED-D the 'Time of estimated arrival' sub-heading is suppressed (estimatedArrival.date.heading set to '' at transport_before_bip.js:387-389).
bodyCopy: To identify the means of transport, enter (one of the following): flight number / train number / road vehicle registration number / vessel name (for ferries, also the road vehicle registration number)
Provide details of all road trailers and containers or your consignment may be delayed. You may need to contact your haulier for this.

Enter the time using 24 hour format, for example, 14 50. If you are unsure of the exact time: Avoid using times on the hour, for example, 00 00 / For non-GVMS route, update the time when you know the time of arrival.
layout: govuk-grid-row > govuk-grid-column-two-thirds (with a nested govuk-grid-column-full used for the road-trailers/containers grid)

structure.text: Transport to the port of entry
Means of transport to port of entry
Select means of transport to port of entry / Airplane / Railway / Road vehicle / Vessel

To identify the means of transport, enter (one of the following): flight number / train number / road vehicle registration number / vessel name (for ferries, also the road vehicle registration number)
Are any road trailers or shipping containers being used to transport the consignment?
Provide details of all road trailers and containers or your consignment may be delayed. You may need to contact your haulier for this.
Yes / No (No checked by default); Yes reveals conditional container/seal grid
Container or trailer number (conditional, revealed by Yes)
Add another container or trailer (conditional, revealed by Yes; adds a repeating container/seal/official row up to 70 rows)
structure.govukComponent: link-button (custom, submit button styled as link)
structure.evidence: partials/common/roadTrailersAndShippingContainersInfo.html:100-105 (id=add-container, shown while sealsContainers.length < maxContainers). maxContainers = MAX_CONTAINERS = 70 (utils/constants.js:5). Never rendered in any mined trace (traces only captured index 1 in the collapsed 'No' state).

structure.text: Remove (conditional, per repeating container row when more than one row exists)
structure.evidence: partials/common/roadTrailersAndShippingContainersInfo.html:86-95 (id=remove-container-N, rendered only when sealsContainers.length > 1). Never rendered in any mined trace.

structure.text: Enter the reference number on the air waybill, bill of lading, sea waybill, road consignment note (CMR) or other transport document.
Estimated arrival at port of entry
Date entry: Day / Month / Year + Choose date button (bespoke datepicker)

structure.govukComponent: Date input pattern reused for time (govuk-date-input)

structure.text: Enter the time using 24 hour format, for example, 14 50. If you are unsure of the exact time: Avoid using times on the hour, for example, 00 00 / For non-GVMS route, update the time when you know the time of arrival.

govukComponents.usage: H1 'Transport to the port of entry' and the h2 sub-headings
Port of entry (bcp, enhanced to autocomplete) and Means of transport (transport-means-before)
Transport identification, Transport document reference, plus conditional container/seal number inputs; width-2/width-4 used for date and time inputs
Road trailers/shipping containers Yes/No, with Yes revealing a conditional container/seal details grid
Official seal flag inside the conditional container/seal grid
Groups the road-trailers radio question and the date-input groups
Estimated arrival date (Day/Month/Year) and arrival time (Hour/Minutes) - the date-input three-field pattern is reused for the time entry
Hint text under identification, road-trailers, container/seal, document ref, date and time fields
'Save and return to hub' and 'Save and continue'
Back navigation - note href is '#' not a real URL, JS-driven
Validation summary 'Please fix the following errors' with linked field errors

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: accessible-autocomplete (alphagov) progressively enhances the Port of entry <select name=bcp> into a type-ahead combobox. The a11y tree shows 'combobox Port of entry' pre-filled with 'MANCHESTER AIRPORT (GBMAN)'. Two <status> live regions announce results.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Third-party JS widget layered over a native select. It is the alphagov accessible-autocomplete library, which is a recognised GDS-adjacent pattern but NOT part of govuk-frontend core. The new app must decide whether to reproduce type-ahead or use a plain govuk Select for the ~30 ports.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: govuk-frontend Select (govuk-select) for the raw list; accessible-autocomplete is the GDS-recommended enhancement if type-ahead is wanted. Port list should come from a reference-data service, not be hardcoded.
nonStandardPatterns.legacyNote: For CED the type-ahead is deliberately enabled: viewContext.renderBcpInputAsTypeahead = displayPoesInsteadOfBcps (true for CED) at transport_before_bip.js:397, and the port list is fetched at runtime from the points-of-entry integration (replaceBcpsWithPoesInViewContext, transport_before_bip.js:466-474) — confirming the list is reference data, not hardcoded.
nonStandardPatterns.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 74 (classes eval + a11y combobox e62)

nonStandardPatterns.pattern: defra-datepicker / date-picker__container / date-picker__dialog / date-picker__date-table / date-picker__button__next-month / date-picker__button__previous-month / date-picker__reveal__icon / date-picker-day/month/year
nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Bespoke DEFRA calendar datepicker attached to the estimated-arrival Day/Month/Year date input, exposed via a 'Choose date' button that opens a calendar dialog.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Custom widget with no govuk-frontend equivalent - govuk-frontend has no datepicker component. Adds a calendar dialog, previous/next-month navigation and its own show/hide state on top of the standard date-input. Significant custom JS + CSS surface.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: No direct govuk-frontend datepicker exists. The standard Date input (three text fields, no calendar) is the toolbox-native option; MOJ Frontend has a datepicker component if a calendar is genuinely required. Recommend defaulting to plain Date input unless research shows the calendar is needed.
nonStandardPatterns.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 74 (classes eval; a11y 'Choose date' button e111)

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Custom layout grid wrapping the conditional container-number / seal-number / official-seal repeating rows revealed when 'Yes' is chosen for road trailers/containers. Confirmed as an add-another repeating pattern: an 'Add another container or trailer' button appends rows and a per-row 'Remove' button deletes them.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Bespoke grid rather than a govuk layout/component; is a repeatable add-another-container pattern (container-number-N, seal-number-N, official-seal-N indices; up to 70 rows).
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: govuk grid utilities (govuk-grid-row/column) for layout; the 'add another' repeating rows map to the GOV.UK 'Add another' pattern (not a component - a documented pattern) or a govuk Summary list per container.
nonStandardPatterns.legacyNote: roadTrailersAndShippingContainersInfo.html:31-99 iterates {{#each sealsContainers}}; add button at :100-105 (id=add-container, up to MAX_CONTAINERS=70 per utils/constants.js:5), remove button at :86-95 (id=remove-container-N, only when length>1). Whole block is gated on {{#if showTrailersQuestion}} (gvmsHelper.shouldDisplayTrailersQuestion, transport_before_bip.js:351) AND fieldConfig visibility of sealContainer[0].* (roadTrailersAndShippingContainersInfo.html:1-2).
nonStandardPatterns.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 74 (classes eval + controls eval container-number-1/seal-number-1/official-seal-1)

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Custom class on the 'Means of transport to port of entry' h2 wrapper (transportBeforeBIP.html:30), pairing the heading with the customSelect below it.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: Standard govuk heading + hint / details component.
nonStandardPatterns.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 74 (classes eval); confirmed in template transportBeforeBIP.html:30

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: A submit <button> styled as a link (govuk class link-button) used for the 'Add another container or trailer' and 'Remove' container-row actions.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Blurs link/button semantics; these are true form submits (name=add-container / name=remove-container) that re-post the page, not navigation.
nonStandardPatterns.govukAlternative: govuk-button for actions - keep link/button semantics distinct. The Add another pattern normally uses a secondary govuk-button.

nonStandardPatterns.whatItDoes: Custom visually-hidden and hidden utilities alongside the govuk-visually-hidden class already present.
nonStandardPatterns.concern: Duplicate of govuk-visually-hidden; two conventions for the same job.

fields.name: bcp
fields.label: Port of entry
fields.requiredEvidence: IPAFFS submit validation makes point of entry mandatory for CHED-D under the single-journey and high-risk-EU CED groups: PartOne.java pointOfEntry carries @NotBlank groups {NotificationHighRiskEuCedFieldValidation, NotificationSingleCedValidation} (PartOne.java:385-391, field at :393). The base NotificationCedFieldValidation group does NOT list pointOfEntry, so mandatoriness depends on the CED sub-variant that gates submission. NOTE: the per-page frontend save validator treats bcp as optional (Joi .allow('').optional(), transport_before_bip.js validation:39) — legacy allows a partial save but blocks submit. MANDATORINESS-IS-POLICY: 'required at submit' is how the old system gated it; the rebuild may revisit whether port of entry is mandatory for CHED-D.
fields.notes: For CED the field renders as 'Port of entry' (ALTERNATE_TITLES_AND_LABELS[CED].bcp.title, transport_before_bip.js:108-110) with topOption 'Select port of entry'. The port list is Points-of-Entry reference data loaded at runtime (transport_before_bip.js:466-474), not the hardcoded set above — treat the observed list as a snapshot.
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 74 (selects eval, 31 options incl. placeholder). CORROBORATED: page object TransportDetailsPage.inputPortOfEntry = combobox 'Port of entry' (page-objects/notification/TransportDetailsPage.ts:8-10); workflow drives it via selectPortOfEntry() = type-into-combobox + click option (TransportDetailsPage.ts:126-131), called at ched-d-workflows.ts:285. LEGACY: label + topOption from transport_before_bip.js:108-110; typeahead + reference-data list from transport_before_bip.js:397,466-474.

fields.name: transport-means-before
fields.label: Choose from:
fields.requiredEvidence: The means-of-transport object is mandatory for CHED-D at submit: PartOne.meansOfTransportFromEntryPoint carries @NotNull groups {NotificationHighRiskFieldValidation, NotificationCedFieldValidation, NotificationCvedaEuFieldValidation} (PartOne.java:503-512, field at :529) — the BASE NotificationCedFieldValidation group requires the object. The nested type (this select) is separately @NotNull for {NotificationHighRiskEuCedFieldValidation} and {NotificationSingleCedValidation} (MeansOfTransportBeforeBip.java:99-108, field 'type' at :110). Per-page frontend save treats it optional (transport_before_bip.js validation:42). MANDATORINESS-IS-POLICY.
options: Select means of transport to port of entry
fields.topOptionText: Select means of transport to port of entry
fields.notes: Submit values confirmed by IPAFFS constants TRANSPORT_OPTIONS: Airplane=plane, Railway=rail, Road vehicle=road, Vessel=ship (utils/constants.js:789-806) — exactly the four options and codes already in the spec. Top option for CED = 'Select means of transport to port of entry' (transport_before_bip.js:122-124). Bound to meansOfTransportFromEntryPoint.type (transport_before_bip.js:421-423 / customSelect elementName=transport-means-before at transportBeforeBIP.html:33-42).
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 74; trace b3742f19b6eea5d9285f5c8739571523a0a13ec1 action 77 (select option 'rail'). CORROBORATED: page object dropdownChooseFrom = getByLabel('Choose from:') (TransportDetailsPage.ts:16-18); workflow selects transportMethod (ched-d-workflows.ts:286,643). Submit VALUES confirmed by domain enum types/transport-method.ts AND IPAFFS TRANSPORT_OPTIONS (utils/constants.js:789-806). Happy-path default 'rail' (ched-d-workflows.ts:123); copy-as-new default 'plane' (ched-d-workflows.ts:570). Sits under h2 'Means of transport to port of entry'.

fields.name: identification
fields.label: Transport identification
fields.hint: To identify the means of transport, enter (one of the following): flight number / train number / road vehicle registration number / vessel name (for ferries, also the road vehicle registration number)
fields.requiredEvidence: Mandatory at submit for the single-journey and high-risk-EU CED groups: MeansOfTransportBeforeBip.id carries @NotEmpty groups {NotificationHighRiskFieldValidation, NotificationHighRiskEuCedFieldValidation} (MeansOfTransportBeforeBip.java:32-39) and {NotificationSingleCedValidation} (MeansOfTransportBeforeBip.java:45-49, field 'id' at :71). NOT required by the base NotificationCedFieldValidation group. Per-page frontend save treats it optional with a max-length only (transport_before_bip.js validation:43-45). MANDATORINESS-IS-POLICY.
fields.notes: Legacy hint rendered as an HTML <ul> (flight number / train number / road vehicle registration number / vessel name...) for CHED-D via the isChedD branch of the template (transportBeforeBIP.html:44-55); the non-CHED branch uses the shorter 'Flight number, vessel name or vehicle registration' (transportBeforeBIP.html:57-66) — CHED-D gets the longer copy already captured. Max length 50 chars (see validationMessages).
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 74 (fill 'F12345'; hints eval identification-hint). aria-describedby=identification-hint, width three-quarters. CORROBORATED: page object inputTransportIdentification = textbox 'Transport identification' (TransportDetailsPage.ts:28-30); workflow fills it (ched-d-workflows.ts:287); copy-as-new fills 'Id-123' (ched-d-workflows.ts:571,644). LEGACY: label+hint from transportBeforeBIP.html:46-55 (isChedD branch); binds to meansOfTransportFromEntryPoint.id.

fields.name: consignment-in-container
fields.label: Are any road trailers or shipping containers being used to transport the consignment?
fields.hint: Provide details of all road trailers and containers or your consignment may be delayed. You may need to contact your haulier for this.
fields.requiredEvidence: No @NotNull group on partOne.sealsContainers (PartOne.java:608 declares it as a plain List<@Valid NotificationSealsContainers> with no mandatoriness annotation), and the frontend validator marks consignment-in-container Joi.boolean().optional().allow('') for CED (transport_before_bip.js validation:96-98). Optional for CHED-D. Note the whole road-trailers question only renders when showTrailersQuestion is true (gvmsHelper.shouldDisplayTrailersQuestion, transport_before_bip.js:351) AND the fieldConfig makes sealContainer[0].* visible (roadTrailersAndShippingContainersInfo.html:1-2) — so it can be absent entirely for some CHED-D consignments.
fields.notes: CHEDPP-only requirement DOES NOT apply here: the 'Enter either a seal or container number' cross-field requirement (CONSIGNMENT_SEAL_OR_CONTAINER_REQUIRED, messages/en.js:55) is added only via getSealAndContainerSchema for CHEDPP (transport_before_bip.js validation:119-128) — the CED branch (validation:93-101) does not include it.
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 74. Radio ids are-consignments-in-containers-yes / -no; No checked by default; Yes reveals the conditional container/seal grid (govuk-radios--conditional). LEGACY: roadTrailersAndShippingContainersInfo.html:16-116.

fields.name: container-number-1
fields.label: Container or trailer number
fields.hint: Enter the container identification number, or the trailer registration number or number plate.
fields.requiredEvidence: No mandatory constraint for CED: the container schema (getContainerSealOfficialSchema, applied for CED at transport_before_bip.js validation:93-101) allows empty. A max-length trim/32-char cap is applied only under the CHEDPP branch (getChedPPContainerSchema, transport_before_bip.js validation:186-194) — for CED there is no length cap. Optional.
fields.conditionalOn: 'Yes' selected for road trailers / shipping containers; repeats up to 70 rows (container-number-1..container-number-70)
fields.notes: Part of the Add-another repeating group (container-number-N / seal-number-N / official-seal-N), up to MAX_CONTAINERS=70 (utils/constants.js:5; roadTrailersAndShippingContainersInfo.html:31-105). Legacy label 'Container or trailer number' and hint confirmed verbatim from the partial (roadTrailersAndShippingContainersInfo.html:41-42).
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 74 (controls eval container-number-1; labels eval <label for=container-number-1> = 'Container or trailer number'; hints eval container-number-1-hint). LEGACY: label+hint roadTrailersAndShippingContainersInfo.html:41-42; repeating pattern :31-105.

fields.name: seal-number-1
fields.label: Seal number
fields.hint: Enter the seal number on the official certificate or any other seal mentioned in the accompanying documents.
fields.requiredEvidence: No mandatory constraint for CED: the seal schema allows empty for the CED branch (transport_before_bip.js validation:93-101). A 100-char cap is applied only under CVEDP/CHEDPP (getSealSchema, transport_before_bip.js validation:196-204) — not CED. Optional.
fields.conditionalOn: 'Yes' selected for road trailers / shipping containers; repeats up to 70 rows (seal-number-1..seal-number-70)
fields.notes: Add-another repeating group member (see container-number-1). Legacy label 'Seal number' and hint confirmed verbatim (roadTrailersAndShippingContainersInfo.html:54-55).
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 74 (controls eval seal-number-1; labels eval <label for=seal-number-1> = 'Seal number'; hints eval seal-number-1-hint). LEGACY: roadTrailersAndShippingContainersInfo.html:54-55.

fields.name: official-seal-1
fields.label: Official seal
fields.hint: An official seal is affixed under the supervision of the competent authority issuing the certificate.
fields.requiredEvidence: No mandatory constraint (official-seal schema allows empty for CED, transport_before_bip.js validation:93-101). Optional.
fields.conditionalOn: 'Yes' selected for road trailers / shipping containers; one per repeating container row (official-seal-1..official-seal-70)
fields.notes: 'Official seal' is the fieldset <legend> text (roadTrailersAndShippingContainersInfo.html:64-66); the programmatic checkbox <label for=official-seal-1> is a govuk-visually-hidden placeholder holding the literal 'official-seal-1' (customCheckbox rendered with hideLabel=true and label='official-seal-N', roadTrailersAndShippingContainersInfo.html:70-79) — confirming the legacy a11y-label defect. The new app should give this checkbox a real accessible label.
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 74 (controls eval official-seal-1; hints eval official-seal-1-hint). LEGACY: legend + hint roadTrailersAndShippingContainersInfo.html:64-69; hidden-label defect confirmed at :70-79.

fields.name: document
fields.label: Transport document reference
fields.hint: Enter the reference number on the air waybill, bill of lading, sea waybill, road consignment note (CMR) or other transport document.
fields.requiredEvidence: Mandatory at submit for the single-journey CED group: MeansOfTransportBeforeBip.document carries @NotEmpty groups {NotificationCvedaEuFieldValidation, NotificationSingleCedValidation, NotificationCvedaEuSingleJourneyValidation, NotificationCvedaRowSingleJourneyValidation} (MeansOfTransportBeforeBip.java:139-148, field 'document' at :149). NOTE: it is NOT required by the base NotificationCedFieldValidation NOR by NotificationHighRiskEuCedFieldValidation group — so document is mandatory for single-journey CHED-D but optional for the high-risk-EU CHED-D variant. Per-page frontend save treats it optional with max-length only (transport_before_bip.js validation:46-48). MANDATORINESS-IS-POLICY / VARIANT-DEPENDENT — flag for human ruling.
fields.notes: Legacy CHED-D label 'Transport document reference' and hint from the isChedD template branch (transportBeforeBIP.html:74-85); the non-CHED branch uses label 'Document' / hint 'Air Waybill, Bill of lading or ship manifest' (transportBeforeBIP.html:86-97). Max length 32 chars (see validationMessages). Binds to meansOfTransportFromEntryPoint.document.
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 74 (a11y e91; hints eval document-hint). CORROBORATED: page object inputTransportDocumentReference = textbox 'Transport document reference' (TransportDetailsPage.ts:32-34); workflow fills it (ched-d-workflows.ts:288,645). LEGACY: label+hint transportBeforeBIP.html:76-85 (isChedD branch).

fields.name: arrival-date-day / arrival-date-month / arrival-date-year
fields.label: Estimated arrival at port of entry (Day / Month / Year)
fields.requiredEvidence: Mandatory at submit for the single-journey and high-risk-EU CED groups: PartOne.arrivalDate carries @NotNull groups {NotificationHighRiskEuCedFieldValidation, NotificationSingleCedValidation} (PartOne.java:417-423, field at :435). NOT listed for the base NotificationCedFieldValidation group. Per-page frontend save treats the date as optional (getValidationArgs required:false, transport_before_bip.js validation:229-239). MANDATORINESS-IS-POLICY.
fields.conditionalOn: 5-days-past-to-120-days-future window enforced on submit (inclusive both ends: -5 days and +120 days accepted, -6 and +121 rejected)
fields.notes: Window bounds now confirmed from IPAFFS source: arrival_date_validator.js:18-22 sets pastDateLimit=5, futureDateLimit=120 for CED/CHEDD; the earliest/latest computation (:36-55) accepts [today-5, today+120] inclusive and returns the exact window message otherwise — corroborating the QA-test-inferred boundaries. AMEND-status notifications relax to a future-only bound (see validationMessages).
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 74 (a11y date group e95; controls eval arrival-date-day/month/year). Three govuk-date-input text fields plus a bespoke 'Choose date' calendar (defra-datepicker). Under h2 'Estimated arrival at port of entry'. CORROBORATED: page object inputDay/inputMonth/inputYear + fillArrivalDate() + btnChooseDate (TransportDetailsPage.ts:39-53,86-90), workflow fillArrivalDate (ched-d-workflows.ts:290); boundaries asserted by ched-d-arrival-date.spec.ts:11-63. LEGACY: window limits + message arrival_date_validator.js:18-22,51-55.

fields.name: arrival-time-hour / arrival-time-minutes
fields.label: Arrival time (Hour / Minutes)
fields.hint: Enter the time using 24 hour format, for example, 14 50. If you are unsure of the exact time: Avoid using times on the hour, for example, 00 00 / For non-GVMS route, update the time when you know the time of arrival.
fields.requiredEvidence: Mandatory at submit for the single-journey and high-risk-EU CED groups: PartOne.arrivalTime carries @NotNull groups {NotificationHighRiskEuCedFieldValidation, NotificationSingleCedValidation} (PartOne.java:457-463, field at :467). NOT listed for the base NotificationCedFieldValidation group. Per-page frontend save treats hour/minutes as optional numeric ranges (transport_before_bip.js validation:49-52). MANDATORINESS-IS-POLICY.
fields.notes: Hour constrained 0-23, minutes 0-59 (transport_before_bip.js validation:49-52); an out-of-range or malformed entry yields the 24-hour-format error (see validationMessages). The time field renders for CHED-D because it is gated on {{#if (not isChedA)}} (transportBeforeBIP.html:112-123) and CHED-D is not CHED-A. Hint text = ESTIMATED_ARRIVAL_TIME_HINT_TEXT for CED (transport_before_bip.js:45-50,118-119).
fields.evidence: trace eddc6f6ec852d692c454d319ade1607727a84a4f action 74 (a11y time group e116; controls eval arrival-time-hour/minutes). Uses the govuk-date-input two-field pattern repurposed for a time entry. CORROBORATED: page object inputArrivalTimeHour = textbox 'Hour' + inputArrivalTimeMinutes = textbox 'Minutes' + fillArrivalTime() (TransportDetailsPage.ts:55-61,92-95), workflow fillArrivalTime (ched-d-workflows.ts:291). LEGACY: hint transport_before_bip.js:45-50; range transport_before_bip.js validation:49-52.

fields.name: bcp-or-port-of-entry (variant)
fields.label: BCP or Port of entry
fields.notes: LEGACY-RESOLVED as NOT a CHED-D label: 'BCP or Port of entry' is the CVEDA label (ALTERNATE_TITLES_AND_LABELS[CVEDA].bcp.title, transport_before_bip.js:56-57), not CED. For CED the field is definitively 'Port of entry' (transport_before_bip.js:108-110). This variant belongs to CVEDA, not CHED-D.
fields.evidence: page object exposes inputBcpOrPortOfEntry = combobox 'BCP or Port of entry' (page-objects/notification/TransportDetailsPage.ts:12-14,119-124,139-143), shared across notification types. LEGACY: label owned by CVEDA at transport_before_bip.js:56-57.

fields.name: entry-border-control-post (variant)
fields.label: Entry border control post
fields.notes: LEGACY-RESOLVED as NOT a CHED-D label: 'Entry border control post' is the DEFAULT (fallback) bcp label set in the base viewContext (transport_before_bip.js:304-307); it is overwritten for CVEDP/CED/CVEDA by ALTERNATE_TITLES_AND_LABELS (transport_before_bip.js:365-378). CHED-D always renders 'Port of entry', never this label.
fields.evidence: page object dropdownEntryBorderControlPost = getByLabel('Entry border control post') (TransportDetailsPage.ts:20-22,149-166). LEGACY: default label at transport_before_bip.js:304-307, overridden for CED at :372-378.

fields.name: inspection-premises (variant)
fields.label: Inspection premises
fields.notes: Not part of CHED-D. In the legacy template the control-point/inspection-premise selection is a CHEDPP concern (control_point handling and POINT_OF_ENTRY_CONTROL_POINT_CODE = 'Select inspection premise', messages/en.js:127, added only for CHEDPP at transport_before_bip.js validation:138-142). CHED-D has no control-point sub-select.
fields.evidence: page object dropdownInspectionPremises = getByLabel('Inspection premises') (TransportDetailsPage.ts:24-26). LEGACY: inspection-premise validation is CHEDPP-only (transport_before_bip.js validation:138-142; messages/en.js:127).

fields.name: means-of-transport-after-bcp (variant)
fields.label: Means of transport after BCP or Port of entry
fields.notes: Onward (after-BIP) transport leg. In the legacy model this is partOne.meansOfTransport (MeansOfTransportAfterBip), which is @NotNull only under the TransporterDetailsRequiredCEDValidation group (PartOne.java:484-490) — i.e. it appears for CHED-D ONLY when transporterDetailsRequired is set, on a SEPARATE transport-details page (route TRANSPORT_DETAILS, reached at transport_before_bip.js:255), not on this before-BIP page. So CHED-D CAN capture onward transport, but on a different page; the getNextPage logic routes standard CHED-D straight to Goods Movement Services (transport_before_bip.js:258-260) unless transporter details are required.
fields.evidence: page object dropdownMeansOfTransport = getByLabel('Means of transport after BCP or Port of entry') (TransportDetailsPage.ts:36-38); separate MeansOfTransportAfterBcpPage.ts also exists. LEGACY: partOne.meansOfTransport @NotNull TransporterDetailsRequiredCEDValidation (PartOne.java:484-490); routing at transport_before_bip.js:248-268.

fields.name: estimated-journey-time-hours (variant)
fields.label: Hours
fields.notes: LEGACY-RESOLVED as NOT a CHED-D field: the estimated-total-journey-time numeric input renders ONLY under {{#if isChedA}} (transportBeforeBIP.html:137-150, elementName=estimated-journey-time-hour) and its validation schema is attached only to the CVEDA case (transport_before_bip.js validation:79-92, ESTIMATED_TOTAL_JOURNEY_TIME_HOURS_KEY). CHED-D never renders it.
fields.evidence: page object inputEstimatedJourneyTimeHours = textbox 'Hours' (TransportDetailsPage.ts:63-65). LEGACY: isChedA-only in template transportBeforeBIP.html:137-150; CVEDA-only validation transport_before_bip.js validation:79-92.

validationMessages.message: You cannot enter a date more than 5 days in the past or 120 days in the future
validationMessages.field: arrival-date (estimated arrival at port of entry)
validationMessages.trigger: Submitting an estimated arrival date outside the window of 5 days in the past to 120 days in the future. Boundary is inclusive: -5 days and +120 days accepted; -6 days and +121/+122 days rejected. Applies to non-AMEND status.
validationMessages.evidence: trace e95111d9f2449732784429eceebefcbade588d35 action 230 (error summary + inline govuk-error-message; link href=#arrival-date, id=error-description-0). CORROBORATED by tests: page object matches via linkValidationErrors = link 'You cannot enter a date more' and firstErrorMessage = #error-description-0 (TransportDetailsPage.ts:78-84); ched-d-arrival-date.spec.ts asserts the error at -6 days (line 33) and +122 days (line 62), absent at -5/+120 boundaries (lines 23,52). LEGACY-CORROBORATED: exact string built from pastDateLimit=5/futureDateLimit=120 for CED at arrival_date_validator.js:18-22,54.

validationMessages.message: You cannot enter a date more than 120 days in the future
validationMessages.field: arrival-date (estimated arrival at port of entry)
validationMessages.trigger: AMEND-status CHED-D notification only: when amending an existing notification, the past-date floor is dropped and only the +120-day future ceiling is enforced (arrivalDate later than today+120). Never exercised in the mined traces (all traces were new notifications).
validationMessages.evidence: arrival_date_validator.js:43-49 (if notificationStatus === AMEND, returns `You cannot enter a date more than ${futureDateLimit} days in the future`; futureDateLimit=120 for CED per :18-22).

validationMessages.message: Identification must be 50 characters or fewer
validationMessages.trigger: Transport identification value longer than 50 characters on submit/save.
validationMessages.evidence: transport_before_bip.js validation:43-45 (IDENTIFICATION_KEY Joi.string().max(50) with message errorMessages.maxLengthMessage(labels.IDENTIFICATION, 50)); template maxLengthMessage = `${label} must be ${maxLength} characters or fewer` (messages/en.js:3-5); label IDENTIFICATION='Identification' (labels/en.js:59). COPY-INCONSISTENCY: the on-screen field label is 'Transport identification' but the error uses the internal short label 'Identification' — flag for the rebuild to reconcile.

validationMessages.message: Document must be 32 characters or fewer
validationMessages.trigger: Transport document reference value longer than 32 characters on submit/save.
validationMessages.evidence: transport_before_bip.js validation:46-48 (DOCUMENT_KEY Joi.string().max(32) with message errorMessages.maxLengthMessage(labels.DOCUMENT, 32)); maxLengthMessage template messages/en.js:3-5; label DOCUMENT='Document' (labels/en.js:43). COPY-INCONSISTENCY: on-screen label is 'Transport document reference' but the error uses the internal short label 'Document' — flag for reconcile.

validationMessages.message: Enter a valid time in 24 hour format
validationMessages.trigger: Arrival time hour outside 0-23 or minutes outside 0-59 (or otherwise non-numeric). On this error the hour/minutes payload values are cleared. Applies to all CHED types including CED.
validationMessages.evidence: transport_before_bip.js validation:49-52 (ARRIVAL_TIME_HOUR_KEY number min 0 max 23; ARRIVAL_TIME_MINUTES_KEY number min 0 max 59) and :145-152 (on a range error, both keys cleared and errorMessages.VALID_TIME_24_HOUR_FORMAT added under ARRIVAL_TIME_KEY); message text messages/en.js:156 = 'Enter a valid time in 24 hour format'.

validationMessages.trigger: Any validation failure on submit renders the govuk-error-summary with this title

validationMessagesNotApplicableToChedD.message: Enter an estimated arrival date and time at BCP that is not in the past
validationMessagesNotApplicableToChedD.reason: CHEDPP-only: added via validationForCHEDPP (transport_before_bip.js validation:241-259, ESTIMATED_ARRIVAL_AT_BCP); messages/en.js:43. The CED branch does not run this check.

validationMessagesNotApplicableToChedD.message: Enter either a seal or container number
validationMessagesNotApplicableToChedD.reason: CHEDPP-only cross-field requirement (getSealAndContainerSchema, transport_before_bip.js validation:119-128,221-227; CONSIGNMENT_SEAL_OR_CONTAINER_REQUIRED messages/en.js:55). Not wired into the CED branch.
CHEDPP-only control-point requirement (transport_before_bip.js validation:138-142; POINT_OF_ENTRY_CONTROL_POINT_CODE messages/en.js:127). CHED-D has no control-point sub-select.

openQuestions: MANDATORINESS RULING NEEDED (variant-dependent): IPAFFS gates submit through CED sub-variant groups. Under the single-journey group (NotificationSingleCedValidation) AND the high-risk-EU group (NotificationHighRiskEuCedFieldValidation), port of entry, means of transport (type), transport identification (id), arrival date and arrival time are all mandatory (see each field's requiredEvidence). 'document' (transport document reference) is mandatory ONLY for single-journey CED, NOT for high-risk-EU CED. The BASE NotificationCedFieldValidation group requires only the meansOfTransportFromEntryPoint object to exist. The rebuild must decide (a) which of these variants CHED-D maps to, and (b) whether to keep this mandatoriness or revisit it. required=true has been set for the six fields required by the single-journey group; treat as legacy policy, not a rebuild decision.

COPY RECONCILE: the max-length error messages use internal short labels ('Identification', 'Document') that differ from the on-screen field labels ('Transport identification', 'Transport document reference'). Decide the rebuild's error copy — reuse the field label for consistency.

Add-another repeating containers RESOLVED: up to MAX_CONTAINERS=70 rows (utils/constants.js:5), with an 'Add another container or trailer' button (id=add-container) and per-row 'Remove' buttons (roadTrailersAndShippingContainersInfo.html:86-105). The whole road-trailers block is conditional on GVMS-route logic (gvmsHelper.shouldDisplayTrailersQuestion, transport_before_bip.js:351) AND fieldConfig visibility — confirm the rebuild's condition for showing it.

The road-trailers/containers block and its fields have NO mandatory constraint for CHED-D (partOne.sealsContainers is unannotated, PartOne.java:608; CED container/seal/official schemas allow empty). Container/seal length caps (32/100) apply only to CHEDPP/CVEDP, NOT CED — confirm the rebuild wants no length limit on CHED-D container and seal numbers.

Onward (after-BIP) transport for CHED-D: partOne.meansOfTransport is @NotNull only under TransporterDetailsRequiredCEDValidation (PartOne.java:484-490) and is captured on a SEPARATE transport-details page (route TRANSPORT_DETAILS), reached only when transporterDetailsRequired is set; standard CHED-D routes straight to Goods Movement Services (transport_before_bip.js:258-260). Confirm whether the rebuild's CHED-D journey includes the second (after-BIP) transport page.

The bespoke defra-datepicker calendar dialog and accessible-autocomplete are progressive enhancements - is the underlying no-JS experience (plain select + plain date input) the intended fallback the new app should build to? (For CED the typeahead is deliberately on: renderBcpInputAsTypeahead=true, transport_before_bip.js:397.)

RESOLVED (legacy): the six shared-page-object controls that no CHED-D trace rendered are now attributed — 'BCP or Port of entry' = CVEDA label (transport_before_bip.js:56-57); 'Entry border control post' = default/fallback label overridden for CED (transport_before_bip.js:304-307,372-378); 'Inspection premises' = CHEDPP control-point concern (validation:138-142); 'Hours' estimated-journey-time = CHED-A only (template :137-150); 'Means of transport after BCP or Port of entry' = the after-BIP leg on a separate page. None are on the CHED-D before-BIP page except as noted.
